## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style (`gofmt`, imports, error handling).
- [ ] I self-reviewed the patch for correctness and readability.
- [ ] I added/updated tests where applicable.
- [ ] I updated docs for user-visible behavior.
- [ ] I ran `just check` and validated results.
- [ ] No breaking changes without explicit migration notes.
